display.purpose: Page heroes and dashboard titles. Once per view at most.

headline.purpose: Section headers, card titles, major content divisions.

title.purpose: Subsection headers, dialog titles, prominent labels.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, table content. 68ch max line length.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata, eyebrow text. Uppercase variant at 11px / 0.16em tracking.

mono.purpose: Code, token values, model IDs, technical data.

shadows.name: ambient-xs
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift on hover rows, tooltips.

shadows.name: ambient-md
shadows.purpose: Default card elevation. The workhorse shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for interactive elements (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: ease-theme
motion.purpose: Theme-switch transition on background-color, border-color, box-shadow, color.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single cross-mode call-to-action. Used for form submission, primary actions, and confirmations. Appears at most once per visible area.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions, toolbar buttons, and inline controls. Transparent at rest, reveals surface on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg class="ds-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" width="18" height="18"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>Edit</button>

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. Generous radius, soft ambient shadow, subtle border. The workhorse surface.
components.html:
Risk Summary

Aggregated exposure across monitored portfolios.

Content area with default 24px padding.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Clean border, focused ring treatment, contextual error state.

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Primary navigation element. Icon + label, three visual states (default, hover, active), smooth transition.
components.html: Risk Analysis

components.name: Sidebar Nav Group
components.description: Labeled group of nav items with optional border-top divider between groups.
components.html: Core Workspace

components.name: Meta Chip
components.description: Small pill-shaped metadata indicator. Used for status, categories, and inline data points.
components.html: High RiskCriticalResolved

components.name: Workspace Utility Bar
components.description: Sticky top bar for the workspace shell. Frosted glass effect with context breadcrumb. The single place glassmorphism is permitted.

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Light/dark mode switch. Moon icon when in light mode, sun icon when in dark. Instant theme swap with smooth CSS transition.
components.html: <button class="ds-theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" width="18" height="18"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg></button>

narrative.overview: FinModPro speaks with the voice of a composed expert. It is neither playful nor tense — it is deliberate, restrained, and quietly authoritative. The interface serves two postures of the same disciplined mind: the analyst bent over a warm-lit desk, pulling threads through evidence, and the operator scanning live telemetry in a darkened room. The workspace shell wraps the analyst in paper tones — parchment, ink, ochre. It is a study: warm, focused, unhurried. The admin shell surrounds the operator in deep navy, brass, and signal teal. It is a war room: technical, alert, precise. These two modes are visually distinct but structurally coherent. The same grid, the same sidebar anatomy, the same typographic hierarchy carries across both. The transition between them feels intentional, not jarring. This system explicitly rejects the standard SaaS dashboard template — no blue-white gradient heroes, no icon-card grids, no decorative glass. Every surface, shadow, and tint exists because it serves the user's work. Nothing is decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-mode visual identity: warm parchment study for analysts, dark navy war room for operators
Tinted neutrals throughout — no pure black or white anywhere
Soft ambient elevation with large-blur, low-opacity shadows
Restrained color strategy: one blue accent at ≤10% surface coverage
DM Sans for headings, PingFang SC for body — bilingual Chinese/English ready

rules.name: The Two-Desk Rule
rules.body: Workspace surfaces use warm tones (parchment, ink, ochre). Admin surfaces use cool tones (navy, brass, teal). Never mix warm workspace colors into admin or vice versa — the boundary is absolute. Command Blue is the only color that crosses both modes.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Command Blue appears on ≤10% of any given screen. If a screen feels blue, it has too much accent. The accent's power comes from restraint.

rules.name: The Scale Jump Rule
rules.body: Adjacent type steps differ by ≥1.25×. No 14px/15px pairs. If two sizes look almost the same, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Length Cap Rule
rules.body: Body text lines never exceed 68ch. If a line runs longer, the container is too wide or the column needs subdivision.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus). A card sitting on the page with a heavy shadow is an error.

rules.name: The No Nested Cards Rule
rules.body: Cards inside cards are prohibited. A card is a terminal container. If content needs subdivision, use a section heading, a divider, or whitespace.

dos: Do use workspace tokens (parchment, dossier ink, ochre) exclusively within workspace shells and admin tokens (war room navy, brass, signal teal) exclusively within admin shells.
Do cap body text at 68ch line length. Use max-width on prose containers.
Do keep Command Blue to ≤10% of any screen. It is the punctuation, not the paragraph.
Do use the 24px card radius consistently for all card-like containers.
Do prefer transparent/surface-hover backgrounds for interactive items at rest. Reserve shadows for elevated states.
Do use the type scale as defined — never interpolate sizes between steps.
donts: Don't use the standard SaaS blue-white dashboard template — gradient hero stats, icon-card grids, or decorative glass panels.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff). Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text). Use a single solid color.
Don't nest cards inside cards. A card is a terminal container.
Don't use glassmorphism except in the workspace utility bar.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
Don't use bounce or elastic easings. Ease-out-quart or expo curves only.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't default to modals. Exhaust inline expansion, drawers, or progressive disclosure first.
